title: gilia transmontana
intro: Gilia transmontana, also known as sky pilot or mountain gilia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the phlox family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Gilia transmontana can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in capsule or powder form to support overall well-being.
